prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度显示电子信息/通信高热推荐（heat_inde x 76.86）、电气工程高热推荐（74.28）、计算机类偏热推荐（67.8），与威海校区物理类招生专业高度契合；陕西省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约19.7 %，竞争加剧；威海校区位于山东省，距陕西较远；但物理类招生规模从27人扩至43人，在陕招生人数显著增加，有利于更多陕 西考生报考。

- 电子信息类（智能工程新工科实验班）（计算机科学与技术、电子科学与技术、机器人工程）。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Science Group (Science/Physics Category) were 7205 → 11190 → 14858 → 7584 → 6979, showing significant fluctuations; after a sharp decline in 2022–2023, there was a strong recovery in 2024–2025, with the 2025 baseline at approximately 6979, the best level in the past five years; the university's enrollment plan for the Science Group in Shaanxi Province: 25 in 2021, 23 in 2022, 23 in 2023, 26 in 2024, 27 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 43, an increase of 16 (+59.3%) compared to 2025, a very large expansion that significantly increases admission opportunities.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, sharing Shandong University's soft science main ranking of approximately 22nd; the Weihai campus has the same academic level as the main campus, belonging to the top-tier university group in China; Shandong University's reputation has been somewhat negative in recent years, but the Weihai campus has been less affected; ranked 20th overall on Douyin (high popularity), with high social attention; in 2022, Shandong University experienced a severe ranking drop in Shaanxi, but by 2024–2025, the rankings had clearly recovered, and the impact of the drop has largely subsided; sharing Shandong University's discipline evaluations: Mathematics A+, Control Science and Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A-, strong strength in electronic information-related disciplines; the Mathematics, Electronic Information, and Physics categories offered at the Weihai campus are all advantageous disciplines of Shandong University.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, major popularity shows that Electronic Information/Communication is highly recommended (heat_index 76.86), Electrical Engineering is highly recommended (74.28), and Computer Science is moderately recommended (67.8), which are highly consistent with the Physics Category majors offered at the Weihai campus; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Shaanxi Province is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 172,468 in 2025, intensifying competition; the Weihai campus is located in Shandong Province, relatively far from Shaanxi; however, the Physics Category enrollment scale has expanded from 27 to 43, significantly increasing the number of students admitted in Shaanxi, which is beneficial for more Shaanxi examinees to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the strong recovery trend of rankings in 2024–2025, the significant benefit of a 59.3% expansion in 2026, the competitive pressure of a 19.7% increase in Physics Category examinees, and the high popularity of hot majors such as Electronic Information and Computer Science, on the basis of the 2025 baseline of 6979, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 9501, with a range of 9001–10001.

- Electronic Information (Intelligent Engineering New Engineering Experimental Class) (Computer Science and Technology, Electronic Science and Technology, Robotics Engineering).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 9001–10001, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors such as Physics and Marine Science, with Tier 1 majors like Mathematics and Electronic Information as reach options, and Tier 3 Economics as a safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 9001), you can focus on reaching for popular engineering majors such as Electronic Information (Intelligent Engineering New Engineering Experimental Class).

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the liberal arts group (liberal arts/history category) were 952 → 843 → 1036 → 1301 → 1315, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 472 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 1315; the university's enrollment plan for the liberal arts group in Shaanxi Province: 10 in 2021, 9 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 15 in 2024, 15 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 18, an increase of 3 (+20%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, sharing Shandong University's main ranking of approximately 22nd on the Soft Science Ranking, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities; the Weihai campus and the main campus share the same enrollment code system, with consistent educational levels; Shandong University's reputation has been somewhat negative in recent years (e.g., a gap in Shaanxi in 2022, the study partner incident in 2023, a decline in admission scores in 2024, etc.), but Shandong University (Weihai), as an independent campus, has been relatively less affected; ranked 20th overall on Douyin (high popularity), with high social attention and undiminished application enthusiasm; shares Shandong University's discipline evaluation results: Mathematics A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literature A, Control Science and Engineering A, Marxist Theory A, Applied Economics A-, Law A-, Physics A-, Biology A-, Business Administration A-, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, major popularity shows that engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended, while liberal arts majors like Law and Chinese Language and Literature are relatively hot; in 2026, the number of history category candidates in Shaanxi Province is about 88,500, an increase of about 17% compared to 75,641 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Shandong University (Weihai) is located in Weihai City, Shandong Province, relatively far from Shaanxi Province, making it a cross-provincial satellite campus; the Weihai campus has a small enrollment scale in Shaanxi (15-18 people), and regional preferences have limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend in rankings, the mitigating effect of a 20% expansion in 2026, the intensified competition due to a 17% increase in history category candidates in the province, and the offsetting effect of a somewhat negative school reputation but high Douyin popularity, based on the 2025 baseline of 1315, the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to be around 1500, with a range of 1275–1725.
